title: lithocarpus ochraceus
intro: Lithocarpus ochraceus, also known as the tanbark oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Lithocarpus ochraceus include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and supporting digestive health. Lithocarpus ochraceus is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
